sources.title: A.R.M. Holding — Group Strategy & Investment Approach
sources.summary: A.R.M. Holding is a UAE-based private investment and real estate company focused on building scalable ventures with lasting social and economic value. The group invests from early-stage to pre-IPO across real estate, hospitality, and banking, alongside future-focused industries including healthtech, sustainable food, mobility, fintech, and cultural initiatives.

sources.title: A.R.M. Holding — Values & Leadership
sources.summary: Core values: Integrity, Cooperation, Agility, Creativity, Humility. CEO H.E. Mohammad Saeed Al Shehhi leads the group with a belief that meaningful progress happens when financial growth and cultural enrichment advance together.

sources.title: DREC — Dubai Real Estate Centre Portfolio Review
sources.summary: DREC manages over 3,200 residential and commercial units including Palm Spring Village and The Beach Centre. Long-standing real estate player in the UAE with diversified income streams.
sources.citation: DREC Portfolio Review Q1 2026 | A.R.M. Holding

sources.title: HUNA — Design-Led Development Strategy
sources.summary: HUNA is a design-led real estate developer bringing together architecture, culture, and commerce. Each space is curated to offer a refined living experience shaped by leading creatives and visionary brands.

sources.title: HIVE — Coliving Operations & Community Model
sources.summary: Hive Coliv offers flexible, furnished living for creatives and professionals with shared spaces and built-in amenities, supporting a connected community-first lifestyle in Dubai.

sources.title: We Emerge Stronger — Art Dubai Sculpture Commission
sources.summary: Open call for a permanent public sculpture at HUNA Sculpture Park at H Residence. Commission name from His Highness Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan — نظهر أقوى — resilience, renewal, and shared strength. Open 17 June to 25 July 2026.
sources.citation: We Emerge Stronger Commission | A.R.M. Holding × Art Dubai

sources.title: Dubai Economic Agenda D33 — Portfolio Alignment
sources.summary: Tracks A.R.M. Holding portfolio alignment with Dubai Economic Agenda D33: trade growth, FDI, SMEs, talent attraction, and quality of life — mapped to DREC, HUNA, and HIVE initiatives.

sources.title: RERA & DLD Compliance Framework — Group Policy
sources.summary: Group-wide compliance framework for Dubai real estate operations: RERA rental index, escrow, broker licensing, DLD registration, and hospitality permits across DREC and HUNA assets.
sources.citation: RERA Compliance Framework 2026 | A.R.M. Holding Legal

chunks.docTitle: A.R.M. Holding — Group Strategy & Investment Approach
chunks.text: A.R.M. Holding is a UAE-based private investment and real estate company focused on building scalable ventures with lasting social and economic value across diverse sectors. Our approach focuses on long-term, meaningful growth, backing companies that create tangible value for people, industries, and urban life.

chunks.docTitle: A.R.M. Holding — Group Strategy & Investment Approach
chunks.text: Our portfolio spans early-stage to pre-IPO investments across real estate, hospitality, and banking, alongside future-focused industries like healthtech, sustainable food, mobility, fintech, and cultural initiatives. Investments aim to uplift communities, foster innovation, and build a more resilient future.

chunks.docTitle: A.R.M. Holding — Group Strategy & Investment Approach
chunks.text: Real estate portfolio companies include DREC (Dubai Real Estate Centre), HUNA (design-led developer), and HIVE (flexible coliving). Culture is woven into everyday life — art should be part of public spaces, as reflected in the We Emerge Stronger sculpture commission at HUNA Sculpture Park.

Our values: Integrity — honesty and transparency. Cooperation — mutual respect across cultures. Agility — fast adaptation in a shifting world. Creativity — bold ideas turned into progress. Humility — grounded, open-minded leadership measured by value created for others.

H.E. Mohammad Saeed Al Shehhi, CEO of A.R.M. Holding: In a diverse community of over 200 nationalities, art is a bridge that connects us. We invest not just in businesses, but in the cultural fabric that binds us together. Meaningful progress happens when financial growth and cultural enrichment advance hand in hand.

chunks.docTitle: DREC — Dubai Real Estate Centre Portfolio Review
chunks.text: DREC is a long-standing real estate player in the UAE managing over 3,200 residential and commercial units. Portfolio includes Palm Spring Village and The Beach Centre. Q1 2026 occupancy held at 94.2% across core assets with rental collections on track.

chunks.docTitle: DREC — Dubai Real Estate Centre Portfolio Review
chunks.text: DREC commercial leasing pipeline: AED 124M active negotiations across three retail anchors. RERA rental index update requires portfolio repricing review by Q3. Beach Centre footfall up 11% YoY following hospitality recovery.

HUNA brings together architecture, culture, and commerce. Each development is curated with leading creatives and visionary brands to deliver refined living experiences. H Residence anchors the HUNA Sculpture Park — site of the We Emerge Stronger permanent commission.

HUNA competitive positioning: design-led differentiation vs volume developers. Next launch targets waterfront lifestyle district with pre-sales target AED 280M. Art Dubai partnership strengthens cultural narrative and international buyer appeal.

Hive Coliv offers flexible furnished living for creatives and professionals. Shared spaces and built-in amenities support community-first lifestyle in Dubai. Occupancy 91% with average stay length 8.4 months. Expansion pipeline: 2 new buildings under feasibility.

chunks.docTitle: We Emerge Stronger — Art Dubai Sculpture Commission
chunks.text: We Emerge Stronger is an open call for a permanent public sculpture at HUNA Sculpture Park, H Residence. A.R.M. Holding in collaboration with Art Dubai. Commission name from HH Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan — نظهر أقوى — resilience, renewal, shared strength. Submissions 17 June to 25 July 2026.

chunks.docTitle: We Emerge Stronger — Art Dubai Sculpture Commission
chunks.text: Culture is essential to how we build cities and communities. Art should be woven into everyday life, giving artists freedom to develop bold proposals while creating lasting public presence connected to environment. UAE-based, regional, and international artists invited.

chunks.docTitle: Dubai Economic Agenda D33 — Portfolio Alignment
chunks.text: D33 alignment score 86/100 for A.R.M. Holding portfolio. Strong fit: quality of life (HUNA design), SME ecosystem (HIVE coliving), FDI attraction (hospitality assets), cultural tourism (We Emerge Stronger). Trade and logistics exposure moderate via DREC commercial.

chunks.docTitle: Dubai Economic Agenda D33 — Portfolio Alignment
chunks.text: Priority D33 initiatives mapped: double foreign trade, AED 100B annual FDI, 65,000 young Emiratis in private sector, top 3 global city. ARM actions: accelerate HUNA international marketing, expand HIVE for young professionals, DREC Emiratisation in property management.

chunks.docTitle: RERA & DLD Compliance Framework — Group Policy
chunks.text: Group RERA compliance: rental index updates require portfolio repricing within 30 days. Escrow accounts audited quarterly. Broker licences renewed annually. DLD registration SLA 5 business days for new leases. Filing due 11 days for Q2 rental disclosure enhancement.
